_comment: MCP server definitions. Copy relevant sections into .claude/claude.json > mcpServers.

filesystem._comment: Replace [USERNAME] and [PROJECT_DIR] with your actual paths. Scopes FS access to this directory only.

github._comment: Create a PAT at github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope. Gives agents access to read PRs and issues.

postgres._comment: Read-only database access for debugging. Use a read-only DB user in non-dev environments.
